result.markdown:
--- title: One-Way ANOVA subtitle: Practice Problems for PSY 241 author: Guenther, Benjamin A. project: type: website output-dir: docs format: html: html-math-method: mathjax self-contained-math: false embed-resources: false jupyter: python3 --- Given the following between-subjects data, use a one-way ANOVA with $\alpha = {0.05}$

```{=html}
A B C
24 32 29
18 30 31
21 26 17
29 26 28
23 29 26
20 33 31
20 26 29
26 32 18
25 29 21
21 29 23
19 30 20
16 13 26
```
Summary statistics for these data:
$G = {896} \quad \Sigma{X^2} = {23250} \quad k = {3} \quad N = {36}$
$T_{A} = {262} \quad SS_{A} = {149.67}$
$T_{B} = {335} \quad SS_{B} = {304.92}$
$T_{C} = {299} \quad SS_{C} = {272.92}$

State the Hypotheses
$H_0: \mu_A = \mu_B = \mu_C$
$H_1:$ At least one mean is different

The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {3.28}, \alpha = {0.05}$

Calculate the Degrees of Freedom
$$df_{total} = N - 1$$
$$df_{total} = {36} - 1$$
$$df_{total} = {35}$$

$$df_{between} = k - 1$$
$$df_{between} = {3} - 1$$
$$df_{between} = {2}$$

$$df_{within} = N - K$$
$$df_{within} = {36} - {3}$$
$$df_{within} = {33}$$

Calculate the Sum of Squares
$$SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}$$
$$SS_{total} = {23250} - \frac{896^2}{36}$$
$$SS_{total} = {23250} - \frac{802816}{36}$$
$$SS_{total} = {23250} - {22300.44}$$
$$SS_{total} = {949.56}$$

$$SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}$$
$$SS_{within} = {149.67 + 304.92 + 272.92}$$
$$SS_{within} = {727.51}$$

$$SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}$$
$$SS_{between} = {949.56} - {727.51}$$
$$SS_{between} = {222.05}$$

note: the other way to calculate $SS_{betwen}$ is:
$$SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$$

Calculate the Mean Squares
$$MS_{between} = \frac{SS_{between}}{df_{between}}$$
$$MS_{between} = \frac{222.05}{2}$$
$$MS_{between} = {111.02}$$

$$MS_{within} = \frac{SS_{within}}{df_{within}}$$
$$MS_{within} = \frac{727.51}{33}$$
$$MS_{within} = {22.05}$$

Calculate the *F*-Ratio
$$F_{obt} = \frac{MS_{between}}{MS_{within}}$$
$$F_{obt} = \frac{111.02}{22.05}$$
$$F_{obt} = {5.03}$$

Calculate $\eta^2$
$$\eta^2 = \frac{SS{between}}{SS_{total}}$$
$$\eta^2 = \frac{222.05}{949.56}$$
$$\eta^2 = {0.23}$$

The results:

reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,

$F({2}, {33}) = {5.03}, p < {0.05}, \eta^2 = {0.23}$
